text: IHE – International Higher Education IHE: International Higher Education offers informed analysis and thoughtful commentary on some of the key issues shaping higher education systems and institutions around the world. IHE is a must-read for scholars, researchers, policymakers, and practitioners seeking to understand developments in today’s international higher education field.
